userInput.description: Story requirements in any language (free text). May include genre hints, theme, setting, character concepts, or an entire brief.

tier.description: Narrative intensity tier. Omit to let the pipeline auto-detect via LLM.

mode.description: Pipeline mode (step sequence). Omit to use tier default (design_auto).

genreCode.description: Explicit genre code from the 94-entry taxonomy (e.g. 'rpg-jrpg'). Skips LLM genre detection when provided.

routeGroup.description: Route group: 'planning' for game design pipeline, 'narrative' for story-only.

routingMode.description: Routing strategy. 'auto' = full LLM detection, 'semi' = tier given / mode auto, 'manual' = both given.

model.description: Override LLM model for this run (e.g. 'gemini-2.5-pro'). Uses NARRATIVE_MODEL env default when omitted.
